meaning: adj.血淋淋的,血污的,满是血的
examples: I'm terribly squeamish. I can't bear gory films.
They had to sit through a gory video on surgical procedures.
Friends, acquaintances and British media have identified Adebolajo as the suspect seen in the gory video.
War is very nasty and very ugly and very gory and very sad and very painful.
